3224970.name: Scarlet Key
3224970.description: The Scarlet Key is a single-player horror puzzle adventure that follows the story of a young woman trapped in her cruel husband’s dark and eerie mansion. To escape, players must explore the mansion, solve challenging puzzles, and uncover its disturbing secrets. Along the way, they must find and collect seven hidden keys, each unlocking new areas and revealing more about the husband’s sinister past. Escaping is only possible once all the keys, especially the final scarlet key, are found,
3224970.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
